title: azara celastrina
intro: Azara celastrina, also known as the Chilean hakea or Chilean hake, is a flowering plant species in the family Proteaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Azara celastrina include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with the dried roots being steeped in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
